creator: john@nlc.net.au
text:
Trying to build the apache13-modssl port fails due to "openssl/rsa.h"
	include file not found. This file is included from "openssl/evp.h"

Fix: 

No idea. The port installation of openssl worked fine. Possibly some
	Makefile problem not building and installing the rsa directory.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/www/apache13-modssl ; make
